1813350.name: Operation: Pinkeye Demo
1813350.description: This demo containes the first 3 levels of Operation: Pinkeye, which take you to England and the Scottish Darien in search of Sergio McIain, a South American terrorist hired by the English government to create a chemical to use in their latest attempt to invade Scotland!
1813350.supported_languages: 英语, 法语, 意大利语, 俄语
